nodes.label: AI as technical calculation assistant for pattern sizing
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to give sample patterns and to check my patterns for spelling/grammar errors

nodes.label: AI as research accelerator
nodes.label_negative: AI as crutch hindering skill development
nodes.grounding_span: it has been really helpful to get me kickstarted on my learning journey

nodes.label: AI as guide for creative decisions (color, trends, market advice)
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole decision-maker for creative choices
nodes.grounding_span: I also use AI to generate colour combination ideas, ask for advice on selling at markets, and to predict trends

nodes.label: Human creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely like to decide what pieces I will be making patterns for without asking AI for ideas

nodes.label: AI reliability in stitch calculations
nodes.label_negative: AI miscalculation leading to fitting issues
nodes.grounding_span: I always feel very satisfied when I finish a piece based off of the AI's calculations/advice and it works out perfectly

nodes.label: Skill maintenance and self-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely don't want to become reliant on AI to do calculations and workings out for me, as I want to maintain my own skills

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity in pattern creation
nodes.grounding_span: if I am creating more patterns I might need AI's help to speed up the pattern-making process
